results.title: Ice cold bats limit LSU softball as it falls to Alabama in Game 1 of Super Regionals
results.description: LSU softball fell for the first time in the NCAA Tournament on Friday as it surrendered to Alabama 7-0 in the Tuscaloosa Super Regional. The purple and gold’s hot offense was stifled by the Crimson Tide’s Jocelyn Briski in Game 1 of the best-of-three series. The Tigers were limited to one hit in the contest... The post Ice cold bats limit LSU softball as it falls to Alabama in Game 1 of Super Regionals appeared first on Reveille .

results.title: Gerrit Cole pitches 6 shutout innings for Yankees after 569-day absence
results.description: NEW YORK — New York Yankees ace Gerrit Cole pitched six shutout innings in his return from elbow ligament reconstruction that caused a 569-day absence, leaving with a 1-0 lead against the Tampa Bay Rays on Friday night.

results.title: Nigerians in American Politics: US Community Leader Explains
